overview.description: The iShares 0-1 Year TIPS Bond ETF (ICPI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of US inflation-protected Treasury securities with one year or less to maturity. ICPI was launched on Nov 19, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: ICE BofA US Inflation-Linked Treasury(0-1 Y)
